description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a steeply pitched gable roof in a light gray color. The front facade includes a centered door flanked by two symmetrically placed windows with brown frames, while the rear has a single window. Both side elevations display a single window each, also framed in brown, and the roof overhangs slightly on all sides. The walls are smooth and painted white, giving the house a clean, minimalist appearance. The windows are likely made of glass, and the door appears to be a standard residential entry door. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for a suburban or small-town neighborhood.
description: A compact, white house with a steep gray gable roof, brown-framed windows, and a centered front door. The design is symmetrical and minimalist, with clean lines and simple features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the centered door and two symmetrically placed brown-framed windows.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the steep gable roof and a single brown-framed window.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single window centered on the wall beneath the roof overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two brown-framed windows and the prominent gable roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Centered single door with no porch or steps, flanked by two windows and minimal decorative elements.
